_comment: Tier-2 for kratos plasticity#: catalog yield_surfaces list contains Rankine + SimoJu, implying SmallStrainIsotropicPlasticity3DRankineRankine and SmallStrainIsotropicPlasticity3DSimoJuSimoJu exist via the documented <StrainSize><HardeningType><Dimension><YieldSurface><PlasticPotential> pattern. They DON'T — Rankine and SimoJu are exclusively damage models (SmallStrainDplusDminusDamageRankineRankine3D etc., or SmallStrainIsotropicDamage3DRankine), not plasticity classes. The other 5 catalog yield surfaces (VonMises, Tresca, DruckerPrager, MohrCoulomb, ModifiedMohrCoulomb) DO combine correctly. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (Kratos 10.4.2 + KratosConstitutiveLawsApplication 10.4.2).
